hooks.command: python -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':'notion-searchは使用禁止。notion-fetchでURLを直接指定すること（CLAUDE.md共通制約）'}}))"

python -c "import json,sys,re; c=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); m=re.search(r'status.{0,3}[:=].{0,3}publish', c, re.I); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':'WordPress投稿は必ずdraft（CLAUDE.md共通制約）。status publish を含むコマンドはブロックされます'}})) if m else None"
